title: stelis micacea
intro: Stelis micacea is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis micacea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Stelis micacea are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant for use in capsules or tinctures.
